idx_memory_item_embeddings_ready_lookup.name: idx_memory_item_embeddings_ready_lookup
idx_memory_item_embeddings_ready_lookup.where: status = 'ready' AND embedding IS NOT NULL

idx_memory_item_embeddings_hnsw.name: idx_memory_item_embeddings_hnsw
idx_memory_item_embeddings_hnsw.where: status = 'ready' AND embedding IS NOT NULL

idx_brain_page_embeddings_ready_lookup.name: idx_brain_page_embeddings_ready_lookup
idx_brain_page_embeddings_ready_lookup.where: status = 'ready' AND embedding IS NOT NULL

idx_brain_page_embeddings_hnsw.name: idx_brain_page_embeddings_hnsw
idx_brain_page_embeddings_hnsw.where: status = 'ready' AND embedding IS NOT NULL

chat_batches_accounting_check.name: chat_batches_accounting_check
chat_batches_accounting_check.value: "chat_batches"."reserved_cost_usd" >= 0 AND "chat_batches"."input_tokens" >= 0 AND "chat_batches"."output_tokens" >= 0 AND "chat_batches"."cache_read_tokens" >= 0 AND "chat_batches"."cache_write_tokens" >= 0 AND ("chat_batches"."estimated_cost_usd" IS NULL OR "chat_batches"."estimated_cost_usd" >= 0)

idx_live_turns_recoverable_leased.name: idx_live_turns_recoverable_leased
idx_live_turns_recoverable_leased.where:
"live_turns"."state" NOT IN ('completed', 'failed', 'timed_out')
          AND "live_turns"."run_id" IS NOT NULL
          AND "live_turns"."lease_token" IS NOT NULL
          AND "live_turns"."fencing_version" IS NOT NULL
